programme.title: The Gathering
programme.desc: Adam confronts Jessica for ghosting him and discovers she made assumptions about Kyran's identity; Adam's world is thrown into disarray when Jessica is rushed to hospital during his dad's birthday party, and Kelly seems to know the reason why.

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: When the property for Bumpy's new club is being sold to a powerful, white real-estate developer, Bumpy must convince the black "Straw Man" to sell it to him instead; Mayme and Elise stage a protest at Margaret's school.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: Bumpy battles a union strike threatening club construction; Elise bails out a fellow Panther; Frank faces consequences for Cowboy Nick's murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Mouch builds a classic fire truck model for the Deputy District Chief but needs assistance from Gallo and Ritter; Brett and Violet encounter multiple victims with a strange set of symptoms; Cindy's chemotherapy results loom over the Herrmann family.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to Firehouse 51 to serve with Kidd on a special task force; with Tony close to breaking the CFD's perfect attendance record, Mouch and Capp work to keep him safe; old grudges resurface when Gallo reunites with a family member.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: This true-crime series tells the chilling tales of those most unfortunate souls who unwittingly take up residence within a stone's throw of a psycho or killer.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.sub-title: The Cops, The Fugitive, The Nurse, And Her Lover
programme.desc: When Lanell Barsock is found murdered, it seems obvious to all that her boyfriend did it; when the forensic evidence comes in, investigators are astonished to learn they've arrested the wrong person.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A woman kidnaps another woman and holds her hostage; when the situation escalates quickly, team members question how things was handled.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: This true-crime series tells the chilling tales of those most unfortunate souls who unwittingly take up residence within a stone's throw of a psycho or killer.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.sub-title: The Cops, The Fugitive, The Nurse, And Her Lover
programme.desc: When Lanell Barsock is found murdered, it seems obvious to all that her boyfriend did it; when the forensic evidence comes in, investigators are astonished to learn they've arrested the wrong person.

programme.desc: A woman kidnaps another woman and holds her hostage; when the situation escalates quickly, team members question how things was handled.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Dr. Manning and Dr. Charles assist in a complicated case helping a child who is no stranger to the ED; Dr. Marcel and Dr. Choi tend to a police officer with a mysterious gunshot wound; relationships are put to the test as secrets are revealed.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Dr. Charles and Goodwin fear Dr. Halstead is repeating his past mistakes when a patient with early onset Alzheimer's is brought into the E.D.; Maggie and Ben are concerned when one of Ben's students is admitted; Dr. Manning and Dr. Marcel disagree.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Dr. Charles evaluates a 15-year-old who is brought into the E.D. after an apparent fall off an overpass; Will sides with Dr. Asher on a risky treatment plan; tensions run high between Dr. Choi and Dr. Marcel.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Dr. Crockett is visited by two New Orleans detectives who have questions about his past; Dr. Choi puts his life in danger to save a child; Dr. Charles gives fatherly advice to his young daughter.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.sub-title: When Did We Begin to Change
programme.desc: The staff adjusts to the new normal of the pandemic; Dr. Choi, Dr. Lanik and April fight on the front lines; Dr. Halstead and Hannah face a troubling reality; Dr. Charles tries to clear the air with his daughter following recent developments.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.sub-title: Those Things Hidden in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Goodwin announces a new ED Chief, and the choice doesn't make everyone happy; Dr. Manning takes a stand for her patient and finds herself dealing with the repercussions; Dr. Charles tends to family affairs.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.sub-title: Do You Know the Way Home?
programme.desc: Dr. Charles and April team up to take on a mysterious patient in the ED; Dr. Halstead is forced to make a life-or-death decision for one of his trial patients; Dr. Marcel is confronted by his past when a former acquaintance is brought into the ED.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A peaceful suburb turns upside down when a family learns that the neighbor has kept a secret wife locked in his home for years; things escalate when the family helps her escape with her baby, leading to a bitter feud that ends in terrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: Homicide investigators are convinced an apparent murder-suicide was staged but the experienced CSI on the scene disagrees; only the instincts of the cops, coupled with an outside forensic expert's opinion, convince authorities who the real killer is.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Ed is called to the scene when an SRU veteran locks himself in a safe room with the intent to commit suicide.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A peaceful suburb turns upside down when a family learns that the neighbor has kept a secret wife locked in his home for years; things escalate when the family helps her escape with her baby, leading to a bitter feud that ends in terrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: Homicide investigators are convinced an apparent murder-suicide was staged but the experienced CSI on the scene disagrees; only the instincts of the cops, coupled with an outside forensic expert's opinion, convince authorities who the real killer is.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Ed is called to the scene when an SRU veteran locks himself in a safe room with the intent to commit suicide.

programme.desc: A peaceful suburb turns upside down when a family learns that the neighbor has kept a secret wife locked in his home for years; things escalate when the family helps her escape with her baby, leading to a bitter feud that ends in terrible bloodshed.

programme.desc: Ed is called to the scene when an SRU veteran locks himself in a safe room with the intent to commit suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programme.desc: Homicide investigators are convinced an apparent murder-suicide was staged but the experienced CSI on the scene disagrees; only the instincts of the cops, coupled with an outside forensic expert's opinion, convince authorities who the real killer is.

The first responders continue to deal with the fallout of a massive earthquake; Athena tries to keep the peace as Bobby and team continue to rescue victims from a collapsing high-rise hotel; Maddie must help a pregnant couple deliver their baby.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: The first responders race to rescue victims trapped in various tight spots; Athena contemplates accepting a promotion that will take her out of the field; Chimney finally deals with the aftermath of his near fatal car crash.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: Maddie goes on a ride-along with Athena; Hen must figure out how to save her family from permanently falling apart; the first responders deal with emergencies both at a military funeral and a movie theater.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: The first responders unwittingly become the subject of an eager reporter's first on-air assignment; Athena prepares for May's homecoming dance; the team responds to emergencies at an eating contest, a bodybuilding competition and a toddler pageant.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: Halloween finds the first responders racing to the rescue at a cemetery, a haunted hayride and a spooky parade; Maddie thinks she has received a "ghost" call from a missing hiker; Hen is in a life-or-death situation with her father.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.desc: Buck jumps back into the dating scene but fears he will return to his old ways; a woman goes to great extremes on a freeway overpass to get the attention of her husband; a couple have a car accident on their wedding day.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie struggles to find the right time to come clean about what happened with Liam while Cal gets an unexpected visitor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Hen relives her evolution into the firefighter she is today as she recalls the first times she met Chimney and Athena.
